training_rows: task: complete required term | prompt: fixed= | answer: fixed
task: complete required term | prompt: loss= | answer: loss
fixed route target term is fixed
loss route target term is loss
when prompt begins fixed= complete fixed
when prompt begins loss= complete loss
required term fixed stays on fixed branch
required term loss stays on loss branch
fixed branch answer uses fixed and avoids loss
loss branch answer uses loss and avoids fixed
contract.promotion_requirement: fixed-direct and loss-direct must both hit before pair probe or baseline promotion is claimed
contract.leakage_policy: structured rows may describe direct prompts, but exact heldout probe strings must not be training rows
contract.source_route_boundary: created after the loss-retention prefix repair regressed, so this avoids more single-sided prefix weighting

check_rows.detail: structured template route follows only the closed loss-retention regression branch
source must confirm the prior repair regressed
source default-hit delta must be negative
structured template rows must be substantial enough to materialize
fixed route must have repeated structured anchors
loss route must have repeated structured anchors
fixed, loss, and pair probes must be preserved
exact eval prompts must not be training rows
heldout pair probe must stay out of training rows

interpretation.reason: The previous prefix-weighting repair regressed, so this contract switches to structured prompt-answer rows while preserving heldout direct and pair probes.
interpretation.next_action: materialize the structured-template contract and run a real tiny training comparison
